title: Patlabor 2: The Movie
overview: A Japanese police unit who use giant anthropomorphic robots (called Labors) is caught up in a political struggle between the civilian authorities and the military when a terrorist act is blamed on an Air Force jet. With the aid of a government agent, the team gets close to a terrorist leader to stop things from going out of control when after the military is impelled to impose martial law.

title: Haitoku sakaba: Atsukan jukujo no uzuki
overview: Mitsuru, a songwriter, is staying at an inn in a port town while visiting to write poetry. He is already in a physical relationship with Natsu, an employee at the inn, and he tells her about how he decided to become a writer because of a bitter past incident. Meanwhile, Mitsuru begins to frequently visit the restaurant run by Chiaki. Meanwhile, while her husband, Ippei, is away for an extended period due to certain circumstances, Chiaki is having an affair with her brother-in-law, Jiro...

title: VIRGIN PUNK Clockwork Girl
overview: In an unforgiving world, Ubu Kamigori hunts criminals as a bounty hunter. But one day, waiting in her home is the man she shares a sordid history with—Mr. Elegance. And so, her destiny begins to unravel.

title: Cow
overview: A close-up portrait of the daily lives of a pair of cows: told by way of some narrative-free, intimate POV photography, with plenty of close shot images, we follow the daily routine of these animals as they live what can only be described as mundane, boring lives - all with an ultimate purpose within the human food chain.

title: Re/Member: The Last Night
overview: Three years after completing a deadly game, high schoolers trapped in a looping nightmare must survive brutal encounters and unravel a terrifying curse.

title: A Pale View of Hills
overview: Dual timelines explore a Japanese widow's memories spanning post-war Nagasaki in 1950s and England during 1980s Cold War era, unraveling secrets that intertwine her past and present experiences across borders.

title: Oishii unmei
overview: BL film directed by Daisuke Yamanouchi. Ren is regarded as the red-light district’s romantic trouble-shooter as he resolves rifts between restless hearts but he has regrets from his past as the sudden suicide of his sister Haruka haunts him. On the anniversary of her death, he heads to the roof she threw herself off of in order to lay down some flowers for her memory. This is when he meets Naoto, a handsome man who looks like a host who reveals that he was betrayed by a customer and left penniless. Ren takes him back to his home in order to help…

title: The Silent Service: The Battle of Arctic Ocean
overview: In the freezing northern seas, the Yamato nuclear submarine begins its deep underwater voyage to the tune of Mozart, heading for the United Nations headquarters in New York. In the Bering Strait between the US and Russia, another submarine approaches: an American nuclear submarine that overwhelmingly dwarfs the Yamato. Now, a battle commences among the cracking floes of the cold Arctic Ocean.

title: The Final Piece
overview: Keisuke, a 10-year-old boy, living hard despite being abused by his father, finds a ray of light in the midst of his suffering and conflict ---- a shogi world where he fights quietly and passionately in his sharpened senses. Even though he gives up and tries to escape from the light, his passion for shogi continues to guide him thereafter. Eventually, he would learn the true meaning of life.

title: Marvelous 2025 Final
overview: Marvelous 2025 Final was a professional wrestling event promoted by Marvelous That's Women Pro Wrestling. It took place on December 28, 2025, in Tokyo, Japan at Korakuen Hall.

title: Stardom in Kariya 2026 Mar.
overview: Stardom in Kariya 2026 Mar. was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 1, 2026 at Kariya City Industrial Promotion Center Aioi Hall in Kariya, Aichi, Japan.

title: 花谱 5th ONE-MAN LIVE「宿声 · 深爱」
HENSHIN THE FIRST
overview: Nayuta always wanted to be stronger and more beautiful than anyone else since she was a child. However, her greed is sinful, and she views it as weakness and ugliness, locking it away in her heart. Then, an incident occurs that shakes her destiny. Witness the birth of Kamen Rider Eins from a unique perspective.

title: Future Train: To you who don't know "that day"
overview: The story centers around a three-generation family and the memories of Hiroshima between 1975 and 2025.  Back in 1975, Hiroshima is slowly rebuilding itself after the atomic building. There, lives Ogaki Sachie, a mother who survived the postwar era and single-handedly raise her two daughters while operating a local coffee house.  Half a century later, in present-day Hiroshima, Sachie's granddaughter, Kuramochi Yuki, is now an employee at a local TV station and is assigned to produce a special program. She decides to talk to grandmother who brings up the untold past of Hiroshima for the first time.

title: Street Flow 3
overview: Grieving and facing the consequences of their crimes, the Traoré brothers get one last chance to forge a new path.

title: Unification of Japan 73
overview: Himuro (Yasukaze Motomiya) and Tamura (Yoshiyuki Yamaguchi) return to Kobe, where the Kyowakai executives—still without a clear successor—expect Himuro to become the fourth chairman. Himuro refuses, causing unrest. After meeting Ueki, Himuro decides to respect Kawatani’s wishes and announces only his retirement.  At the same time, the Marugami-kai appoints Sakota as chairman following Mita’s death. Meanwhile, Sunaga of the Keihin Alliance approaches Shinjo and Komiya again. Although the information reaches Himuro through Kuroiwa, Himuro rejects it, saying he does not want the Marugami-kai to split.  Himuro admits he wanted to make Kawatani the number-one boss in Japan and to unite the yakuza world, but Tamura encourages him to be honest with his own feelings. Elsewhere, the Yamazaki Ichimon learns of Shinjo and Komiya and tries to handle things themselves. During this, retired Kyowakai member Nakajima appears, and his new business becomes the spark for a new conflict.

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 1
overview: The opening night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 4, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan, marking the start of New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW)’s annual heavyweight single-elimination tournament and featured two first-round matches.

title: Map of Fukufuku
overview: The short film tells the story of a French philosopher named Sophie, who visits Fukushima Prefecture for the first time to attend a friend's wedding. Sophie loses her way in Fukushima, but a mysterious "friend" and a "map" appear before her, and she follows their lead making detours and stops. Little by little, Sophie realizes that everything in Fukushima is a "culture" that has been created by someone and has been passed down through generations.

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 2
overview: The second night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 5, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan and featured two first-round matches.

title: The Specials
overview: Former assassin Daiya has long left the criminal world, but he decides to take up a mission to kill a rival gang boss for a huge payday. The catch: To kill his target at a talent show, he must go undercover and perform in a pop dance group.

title: War Machine
overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

title: No Other Choice
overview: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a veteran paper mill manager descends into violence in a desperate bid to reclaim his dignity.

title: Wicked: For Good
overview: As an angry mob rises against the Wicked Witch, Glinda and Elphaba will need to come together one final time. With their singular friendship now the fulcrum of their futures, they will need to truly see each other, with honesty and empathy, if they are to change themselves, and all of Oz, for good.

title: The Crow
overview: Soulmates Eric and Shelly are brutally murdered when the demons of her dark past catch up with them. Given the chance to save his true love by sacrificing himself, Eric sets out to seek merciless revenge on their killers, traversing the worlds of the living and the dead to put the wrong things right.

title: Late Shift
overview: Dedicated nurse Floria navigates the relentless pace of her hospital’s understaffed surgical ward with humanity and warmth. As her overnight shift intensifies, she is pushed to the brink in a race against time.

title: Strangers in the Park
overview: A former communist militant and a "live and let live" man form an unlikely friendship on a park bench, sharing their life stories with humor and heart.

title: A New Dawn
overview: Keitaro lives in a fireworks factory that is about to be shut down. He is determined to unravel the mystery of the Shuhari, a mythical firework created by his father before he disappeared without a trace – and launch it before the factory closes.

title: Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen Desu! Act 3
Stardom Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Opening Round: Day 1~
overview: Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Opening Round: Day 1~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 6, 2026, at Chunichi Hall in Nagoya, Aichi, Japan. It primarily focused on first round matches for the company's annual single-elimination tournament.

title: NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE -OVERTURE-
overview: A theatrical compilation of NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE anime series titled NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE -OVERTURE- will start playing at Theatre Shinjuku in Tokyo, and at Theatre Umeda in Osaka on March 6, 2026.

title: If We Were to be Born from Now On
overview: In a beautiful yet mysterious world reminiscent of a mother's womb. Guided by equally mysterious creatures, two twin children embark on a journey to meet the mother they have never known.

title: The Invention Movie
overview: Two Inventors struggle to survive in a job crisis, inspiring them build an anthropomorphic robot to help service them. Meanwhile, their greedy penthouse owner tries to take advantage of them, overpricing their basic needs.

title: NJPW 54th Anniversary Event & New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 3
overview: The 54th Anniversary Event was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on March 6, 2026, at Ota City General Gymnasium in Tokyo, Japan, and featured an IWGP Junior Heavyweight Championship match between DOUKI (c) and Master Wato, as well as an IWGP Junior Heavyweight Tag Team Championship match between Ichiban Sweet Boys (Kosei Fujita & Robbie Eagles) (c) and Robbie X & Taiji Ishimori. The event also included the third night of the 2026 New Japan Cup, which featured two first-round matches.

title: Gyeong-ah's Daughter
overview: Kyung-ah works as a caregiver and lives alone. The only one she can rely on is her daughter, Yeonsu, but it's hard to see her after her independence. Meanwhile, Yeonsu, who was suffering from his ex-boyfriend, argues with him again and heads home. After Yeonsu left, Kyung-ah receives a shocking message.

overview: Prelude to Grand Princess '26 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW). It was held on March 7, 2026 at Shin-Kiba 1st RING in Tokyo, Japan.

overview: Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Opening Round: Day 2~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 7, 2026, at Chunichi Hall in Nagoya, Aichi, Japan. It primarily focused on first round matches for the company's annual single-elimination tournament.

overview: Apex Conquest 2026 in Yokohama was a professional wrestling event promoted by Pro Wrestling NOAH, held on March 8, 2026, at the Yokohama Budokan in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan. In the main event, Yoshiki Inamura defended the GHC Heavyweight Championship against Kenoh.

title: Stardom Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Second Round~
overview: Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Second Round~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 8, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan. It primarily focused on second round matches for the company's annual single-elimination tournament, as well as other featured bouts.

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 4
overview: The fourth night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 8, 2026, at Baycom Gymnasium in Amagasaki, Hyogo, Japan and featured two first-round matches.

title: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 1
overview: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 1 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on March 8, 2026 at Chunichi Hall in Nagoya, Aichi, Japan, and served as the opening show of the tour.

title: STARCRIFICE
overview: N, who has long yearned for the Meteor Festival, comes for the first time to help on the host world of the festival—the “Main Star, Planet R.” The residents here are full of enthusiasm, diligently preparing for the celebration. Just as N is swept up in the lively, joyful atmosphere, he catches sight of another, very different side of the Meteor Festival…

title: Universe Magic 2026
overview: ◯The 1st Match･Tag Team Match 15-Minute Single Match Yuki Toki & Nobuhiko Kimura vs Sentaro Motojima & Takeru Inoue  ◯The 2nd Match･The 1st UNIVERSE CUP 1st Round Match Unlimited Time Single Match Sanshiro Takagi(DDT) vs Great Mummy(MONDAY MAGIC)  ◯The 3rd Match･The 1st UNIVERSE CUP 1st Round Match Unlimited Time Single Match Naomichi Marufuji(NOAH) vs Kuroshio TOKYO Japan(UPTOWN)  ◯The 4th Match･6-man Tag Team Match 20-Minute Single Match Miyuki Takase & Utami Hayashishita & Takumi Iroha vs Mio Momono & Mika Iwata & Mayu Iwatani  ◯Semi-Final･The 1st UNIVERSE CUP 1st Round Match Unlimited Time Single Match Isami Kodaka(Pro-Wrestling Basara) vs The Great Sasuke(Michinoku Pro Wrestling)  ◯Main Event･The 1st UNIVERSE CUP 1st Round Match Unlimited Time Single Match Hayabusa(ZERO1) vs Yumehito Imanari(Ganbare Pro-Wrestling)

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 5
overview: The fifth night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 10, 2026, at ZIP Arena Okayama in Okayama, Japan and featured two second-round matches.

title: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere
overview: With rare access and no holds barred, the acclaimed documentarian investigates a growing ultra-masculine network and its controversial influencers.

title: Stardom Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Quarterfinal Round~
overview: Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Quarterfinal Round~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 11, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan. It primarily focused on quarter-final matches for the company's annual single-elimination tournament, as well as other featured bouts.

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 6
overview: The sixth night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 12, 2026, at Takamatsu City Gymnasium in Takamatsu, Kagawa, Japan and featured two second-round matches.

title: Hoppers
overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

title: Marty Supreme
overview: Marty Mauser, a young man with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
overview: Gabby heads out on a road trip with her Grandma Gigi to the urban wonderland of Cat Francisco. But when Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, Gabby sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together and save the dollhouse before it's too late.

title: 96 Minutes
overview: Former bomb disposal expert, Song Kang-Ren, and his fiancée, Huang Xin, board a high-speed train that contains a bomb. At the same time, Liu Kai, a well-known physics teacher who was involved in an affair scandal, also boards this same train in order to win back his wife, Ting Juan, who took the prior high-speed rail to return home in frustration…  After all, can the bomb be successfully defused this time? and resolve the crisis?

title: Golden Kamuy: Assault on Abashiri Prison
overview: As each group pursues their mission, a fierce battle unfolds over the tattooed prisoners. Who is friend, and who is foe?  The fight leads them all to Abashiri Prison, where Noppera-bo, the man who holds all the answers, is locked away...

title: Samurai Ballerina -L'étoile de Paris en fleur-
overview: Set in the early 1900s, the story follows two Japanese girls chasing their dreams: Fujiko, an aspiring artist, and Chizuru, an aspiring ballerina. They first cross paths in Yokohama, then, following a fateful reunion, pursue their dreams together in Paris.

title: Barbara - Becoming Shirin David
overview: Shirin David. Babsi. Barbara. Meet the woman behind the rap star as she balances fame, business and her identity in this intimate, emotional documentary.

title: Himitsu no AiPri Movie: Mankai Buzzlume Live!
overview: The first Himitsu no AiPri movie. The Ring Princess invites everyone to participate in a "Spring Float Race," but an incident occurs during the contest.

title: 3.11～東日本大震災15年 福島第一原発事故 命の戦い～
NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 7
overview: The seventh night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 13, 2026, at Osaka Kanaoka Park Gymnasium in Sakai, Osaka, Japan and featured two second-round matches.

title: Johatsu - Into Thin Air
overview: In Japan, thousands of people disappear voluntarily every year. And there are companies ready to help those who want to disappear without a trace and start a new life somewhere else. Meet some of them in a film that soberly examines a modern phenomenon.

title: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 2
overview: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 2 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on March 14, 2026 at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 8
overview: The eighth night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 14, 2026, at Nagoya Kinjo Pier Arena in Nagoya, Aichi, Japan and featured two second-round matches.

overview: Cinderella Tournament 2026 ~Finals~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 15, 2026, at the Yokohama Budokan in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan. It primarily focused on the semi-final and final matches for the company's annual single-elimination tournament, as well as other featured bouts.

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 9
overview: The ninth night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 15, 2026, at Aimesse Yamanashi in Kofu, Yamanashi, Japan and featured two quarterfinal matches.

overview: BABYMETAL - World Tour 2025-2026 Special Arena Show in US Intuit Dome was a special headline show by BABYMETAL held at the Intuit Dome in Los Angeles on November 1st 2025.

overview: TJPW Grand Princess '26: Fate in Ryōgoku was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW). It was held on March 15, 2026 at Ryōgoku KFC Hall in Tokyo, Japan.

overview: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 3: Chika Goto Homecoming was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on March 15, 2026 at Sunpearl Arakawa in Tokyo, Japan.

title: The Plastic Detox
overview: This eye-opening documentary follows six couples with unexplained infertility as they lower their exposure to plastics in hopes it helps them conceive.

title: Banned from Broadcast: My Three Wives
overview: The third theatrical film in the "Banned from Broadcast" series focuses on the theme of polygamy and follows four people. Web designer Hagiwara Koji, company owner Nakase Yuko who is the financial backbone of the family, former model Inui Marina, and nurse Uchino Kaede - as they are shown footage of the murder of their husbands.

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 10
overview: The tenth night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 17, 2026, at Big Palette Fukushima in Koriyama, Fukushima, Japan and featured two quarterfinal matches.

title: TJPW Texas Stampede in Austin ~ Day 1
overview: Texas Stampede in Austin ~ Day 1 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW), held on March 17, 2026 at Palmer Events Center in Austin, Texas, USA.

title: Touken Ranbu: The Musical - Higekiri Solo Performance ～Fleeting Dreams～
overview: One of the final installments in the Musical Touken Ranbu series, Higekiri tells the tale of famous folklore demons Ibarakidoji and Shutendoji and their fateful encouter with Watanabe no Tsuna.

title: TJPW Texas Stampede in Austin ~ Day 2
overview: Texas Stampede in Austin ~ Day 2 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW), held on March 18, 2026 at Palmer Events Center in Austin, Texas, USA.

title: Project Hail Mary
overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction… but an unexpected friendship means he may not have to do it alone.

title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
overview: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

title: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy
overview: Kim Dok-ja, an ordinary man in his 20s, is the only reader of an obscure web novel titled "Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse". After having read the last chapter, the novel suddenly becomes reality, and its omnipotent hero Yu Jung-hyeok appears before Kim. As the only person who knows how to survive in this world, Kim and his companions strive to save the world by writing his own, new ending.

title: Little Amélie or the Character of Rain
overview: The world is a perplexing, peaceful mystery to Amélie until a miraculous encounter with chocolate ignites her wild sense of curiosity. As she develops a deep attachment to her family's housekeeper, Nishio-san, Amélie discovers the wonders of nature as well as the emotional truths hidden beneath the surface of her family's idyllic life as foreigners in post-war Japan.

title: Small Things Like These
overview: In 1985, while working as a coal merchant to support his family, Bill Furlong discovers disturbing secrets kept by the local convent and uncovers truths of his own; forcing him to confront his past and the complicit silence of a small Irish town controlled by the Catholic Church.

title: Assassination Classroom the Movie: Everyone's Time
overview: United by a common mission to eliminate their teacher, Koro-sensei, an alien creature with phenomenal strength, join Nagisa and his Class 3-E classmates in brand-new adventures.

title: The Last Song You Left Behind
National Theatre Live: The Fifth Step
overview: After years in the twelve steps of Alcoholics Anonymous, James becomes a sponsor to newcomer Luka. The pair bond over black coffee, trade stories and build a fragile friendship out of their shared experiences. But as Luka approaches step five – the moment of confession – dangerous truths emerge, threatening the trust on which both of their recoveries depend.

title: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Osaka
overview: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Osaka was a professional wrestling event promoted by Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling, held on March 20, 2026, at Azalea Taisho Hall in Osaka, Japan.

title: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 4
overview: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 4 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on March 20, 2026 at Matsuyama City General Community Center in Matsuyama, Ehime, Japan.

title: NOAH Lethal Odyssey Tour 2026
overview: Lethal Odyssey Tour 2026 a professional wrestling event promoted by Pro Wrestling NOAH, held on March 20, 2026, at Kobe Sambo Hall in Kobe, Hyōgo, Japan. title: Mystery Wrestling x ChocoPro 2
overview: Mystery Wrestling x ChocoPro 2 was a collaboration between Mystery Wrestling and Chocopro that aired on 3.20.26

overview: The eleventh night of New Japan Cup 2026 took place on March 20, 2026, at Aore Nagaoka in Nagaoka, Niigata, Japan and featured two semi-final matches.

title: おしり前マン〜復活のおしり前帝国〜
Mobile Fighter G Gundam 30th Anniversary Fighting Movie
overview: A short film made celebrate the 30th Anniversary of of Mobile Fighter G Gundam.

title: Miraculous World: Tokyo, Stellar Force
overview: Kagami drags Marinette to Tokyo to help the Stellars defeat a new supervillain, but Marinette soon realizes her friend has another, untold reason for this trip to Japan.

title: What Does That Nature Say to You
overview: A young poet drops his girlfriend off at her parents' house and is amazed by its size. He bumps into her father, meets her mother and sister, and they all end up spending a long day together; fueled by conversation, food and libations.

title: Yamada Todoroki Law Office
overview: Postwar Ueno: lawyer Yone Yamada’s sister is attacked and the truth buried. Fueled by rage, Yone writes “Article 14” on a wall and, after reuniting with Taichi Todoroki, opens a law office to fight for the oppressed.

title: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Kariya
overview: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Kariya was a professional wrestling event promoted by Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling, held on March 21, 2026, at Kariya City Industrial Promotion Center Aioi Hall in Kariya, Aichi, Japan.

title: Mori Hanae Butterfly Beyond
overview: TV Asahi's special drama to celebrate the 100th birthday of Hanae Mori, the first female Asian haute couture designer.

title: NJPW New Japan Cup 2026 - Day 12 (Final)
overview: The twelfth and final night of the tournament took place on March 21, 2026, at Aore Nagaoka in Nagaoka, Niigata, Japan, and opened with an Open Challenge for Konosuke Takeshita’s NJPW World Television Championship. The show was headlined by the match to crown the winner of the 2026 New Japan Cup, who went on to face Yota Tsuji for the IWGP World Heavyweight Championship at Sakura Genesis 2026.

title: 非正規雇用 リズム＆サバイブ
Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 5
overview: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 5 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on March 21, 2026 at 176BOX in Osaka, Japan.

title: DDT Judgement 2026 ~29th Anniversary Celebration 5-Hour Special~
overview: Judgement 2026 ~29th Anniversary Celebration 5-Hour Special~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by DDT Pro-Wrestling (DDT). The show took place on March 22, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan, and was headlined by Yuki Ueno (c) vs. KANON for the KO-D Openweight Championship.

title: TJPW Texas Stampede in Dallas
overview: Texas Stampede in Dallas was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW), held on March 21, 2026 at College Park Center in Arlington, Texas, USA.

title: Sareee-ISM Chapter X ~ Taiyoushin Chronicle ─15th Anniversary─
overview: Sareee-ISM Chapter X ~ Taiyoushin Chronicle ─15th Anniversary─ was a professional wrestling event promoted by Sareee (as part of her Sareee-ISM series) in commemoration of the fifteenth anniversary of her professional debut. It took place on March 22, 2026, at Yokohama Budokan in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan.

title: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Shinkiba 1st RING ~The Sky Is the Limit~
overview: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Shinkiba 1st RING ~The Sky Is the Limit~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling, held on March 22, 2026, at Shin-Kiba 1st RING in Tokyo, Japan.

title: TJPW Texas Stampede in Houston
overview: Texas Stampede in Houston was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW), held on March 22, 2026 at POST Houston in Houston, Texas, USA.

title: Hannah Montana 20th Anniversary Special
overview: Filmed in front of a live studio audience and hosted by Alex Cooper of 'Call Her Daddy' fame, Miley Cyrus reflects on the creation and impact of the series, with never-before-seen archival footage, and some of the show's most memorable sets will be 'brought back to life' — including the Stewart family living room and the legendary Hannah Montana closet.

title: Nemuri Kyoshiro
overview: Blue-eyed ronin Nemuri Kyōshirō is ordered to eliminate assassins targeting a senior official. A rosary links the plot to hidden Christians, drawing him into rival power struggles—and multiple factions trying to kill him.

title: NOAH Lethal Odyssey Tour 2026
overview: Lethal Odyssey Tour 2026 a professional wrestling event promoted by Pro Wrestling NOAH, held on March 25, 2026, at Shinagawa Stellar Ball in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Stardom New Blood 30
overview: New Blood 30 was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 25, 2026, at Shin-Kiba 1st RING in Tokyo, Japan. In the main event, Ranna Yagami faced Aya Sakura in her first defense of the Future of Stardom Championship.

title: The King of Kings
overview: Charles Dickens tells his young son Walter the greatest story ever told, and what begins as a bedtime tale becomes a life-changing journey. Through vivid imagination, the boy walks alongside Jesus, witnessing His miracles, facing His trials, and understanding His ultimate sacrifice.

title: Young Mothers
overview: Housed in a shelter for young mothers, Jessica, Perla, Julia, Ariane, and Naïma, all of whom have grown up in difficult circumstances, struggle to obtain a better life for themselves and their children.

title: The Way We Talk
overview: Wolf, born into a deaf family, embraces sign language with confidence despite obstacles in life; Sophie, having received a cochlear implant at a young age, continuously strives to be seen as "normal" despite having a "deaf accent." Alan, with a cochlear implant like Sophie, is capable of both spoken language and sign language; he advocates for diverse modes of communication within the deaf community. Bound by love and friendship, the three embark on a self-discovering journey that is not without its moments of pain.

title: Chimney Town: Frozen in Time
overview: After losing his friend Poupelle, young Lubicchi wanders into a mysterious realm where a clock in a tower is frozen at 11:59. To return home, he must restart it – and find the courage to believe again.

title: Street Kingdom: Make your own sound.
The Ogre's Bride
overview: In a Japan where humans and demons co-exist peacefully, Yuzu is an ordinary high school girl who lives in the shadow of her older sister, who is the bride of a demon. One day, she has a life-changing encounter with a beautiful ogre who claims her as his bride.

title: ÜBERMENSCH G-DRAGON 2025 WORLD TOUR THE FINAL
90 Meters
overview: Tasuku is a high school senior taking care of his single mother Misaki, who has ALS. Though they have a helper who visits during the day, Tasuku still has to take care of cooking and housework, as well as helping his mother use the toilet. Because of this, he's had to quit the basketball team. Tasuku hasn't been focusing on his future plans, since he feels like it wouldn't matter in the first place. But when his mother gets approved for more caregivers, he suddenly has the chance to pursue his dream college. But can he really leave his increasingly infirm mother behind?

title: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Sendai PIT
overview: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Sendai PIT was a professional wrestling event promoted by Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling, held on March 27, 2026, at Sendai PIT in Sendai, Miyagi, Japan.

title: NOAH Lethal Odyssey Tour 2026
overview: Lethal Odyssey Tour 2026 a professional wrestling event promoted by Pro Wrestling NOAH, held on March 27, 2026, at Shinjuku FACE in Tokyo, Japan.

title: milet LIVE at Nippon Budokan 2026「Ray of Water」
overview: In February 2026, milet held a concert at the Nippon Budokan, her first performance there in three years. milet named this performance "Ray of Water" with the hope of "bringing a ray of hope to those who watch the live show." Various installations were used to transform the iconic Budokan stage into a fantastic space where light and water intersect and interact. The performance on February 14, 2026 was broadcast exclusively on TBS-1 with all songs uncut. Original behind-the-scenes footage from the program was also included.

title: Chain Reactions
overview: An exploration of the legacy of Tobe Hooper's classic 'The Texas Chainsaw Massacre'.

title: Dream Palace
overview: Hye-jeong, who lost her husband in an industrial accident, moves into a sparky new town apartment 'Dream Palace'. But things go awry, construction defect occurs in her unit, and to catch up the repairment fee, she joins the discount promotion act of the apartment. But her neighbors ostracize her for devaluing the apartment, and to protect the unit she purchased as the exchange on her husband’s life, she dives into the demo once more.

title: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 6
overview: Marigold Spring Victory Series 2026 ~ Day 6 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on March 28, 2026 at Shinjuku FACE in Tokyo, Japan. In the main event, Mayu Iwatani defended the GHC Women's and Marigold Super Fly Championships against Natsumi Showzuki in a double-title match.

title: NJPW Road to Sakura Genesis 2026 - Day 1
overview: The first night of Road to Sakura Genesis 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on March 28, 2026, at Lily Arena Mito in Mito, Ibaraki, Japan.

title: SPECIAL
overview: MV for song 'SPECIAL' by NEW MANUKE. Directed by Takashi Ito

title: Stardom in Sendai 2026 Mar.
overview: Stardom in Sendai 2026 Mar. was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on March 28, 2026, at Dream Messe Miyagi in Sendai, Japan.

title: TJPW Grand Princess '26
overview: TJPW Grand Princess '26 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW), held on March 29, 2026, at Ryōgoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan. It was headlined by Miu Watanabe defending the Princess of Princess Championship against Yuki Arai.

title: NJPW Road to Sakura Genesis 2026 - Day 2
overview: The second night of Road to Sakura Genesis 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on March 29, 2026, at Act City Hamamatsu in Hamamatsu, Shizuoka, Japan.

title: NJPW Road to Sakura Genesis 2026 - Day 3
overview: The third night of Road to Sakura Genesis 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on March 30, 2026, at Twin Messe Shizuoka in Shizuoka, Japan.
